productDisplayName: Nike Men Pintuck Navy Blue Track Pants
description: Composition Blue track pants for men made of 100% polyester, has a wide elasticated waistband with a drawstring, green tape detailing on the sides, two insert pockets on the sides, one pocket at the back with a velcro closure and an appliqued nike swoosh logo on the left legWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount)  Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately with like colours Do not bleach Cool iron Get more out of your workouts with this flattering pair of tracks from Nike. Team this with tees and sports footwear for trips to the gym.
